name: smallTalk
description: smallTalk has created an innovative speaker system to bring recorded caregiver voices to NICU babies. The NICU Egg enhances parent-baby bonding, while the ACTIVE Egg, paired with a sensor-equipped pacifier, aims to support brain development in preterm infants upon FDA clearance. Blending neurodevelopmental science with the power of voice, we empower NICU families--and soon, we'll expand into homes with products for language and early childhood development.
program: Techstars Columbus Powered by The Ohio State University

name: Dependbuild
description: Dependbuild is a SaaS platform revolutionizing risk management for infrastructure projects. Our solution empowers municipalities to efficiently identify, assess, and mitigate risks by leveraging advanced analytics and project-specific data. By automating the risk assessment process, dependbuild enhances decision-making, reduces project delays and costs, and ensures better outcomes for public infrastructure.

name: Besample
description:
Besample is a data marketplace that empowers research beyond the West. 

With a focus on the growing Global South, Besample provides human-focused researchers across healthcare, industry, and academia with access to primary data from a diverse and representative pool of people in 42 countries of Africa, Asia, Latin America, and CIS.
program: Techstars Columbus Powered by The Ohio State University

name: Doohickey
description: Doohickey is an AI-powered integration platform that helps IT teams in commerce build and manage system integrations easily and reliably. It simplifies tasks like connecting APIs, mapping data, and handling errors, so critical data flows smoothly. With Doohickey, IT leaders can deliver solutions faster and with less hassle.
program: Techstars Columbus Powered by The Ohio State University
